title: Why “Hating Cars” Actually Protects The Fossil Fuel Status Quo
description: The YouTube channel Not Just Bikes recently dropped a 48-minute video titled “Every Reason to Hate Cars.” Honestly, the host brings up some valid points. He talks about traffic fatalities, the sheer amount of space parking lots waste, and how even EVs chew through tires and kick up microplastics. There’s ... title: These Ancient Footprints Sat Hidden for 23,000 Years, and They Are Changing What We Thought We Knew About America
description: Human footprints discovered at White Sands National Park have been dated to 21,000-23,000 years old, pushing back the timeline of human presence in North America significantly. These ancient tracks, found alongside extinct megafauna, were preserved in gypsum-rich mud, offering a rare glimpse into life during the Last Glacial Maximum and reshaping our understanding of early human migration.

title: Dino dung update: Amateur fossil hunter gets confirmation on Bo'ness find
description: A Bo’ness resident who discovered a dinosaur poo fossil has now had confirmation that it is 330 million years old.

title: Workers dug a ditch, found ancient Gold: This reclining Buddha statue hid 1300-year-old Gold treasures
description: Construction workers in Thailand unearthed a 1,300-year-old treasure trove of gold, silver, and bronze artifacts near a massive reclining Buddha. The discovery, including rings, earrings, and hammered metal sheets depicting Buddha, dates back to the Dvaravati period. These ancient devotional offerings offer a glimpse into historical artistry and faith.

title: In the Passover ritual, Jews worldwide reenact an ancient story of liberation
description: Passover is a major Jewish holiday, celebrated over the course of a week each spring. It commemorates the Exodus of ancient Israelites from slavery in Egypt, as recounted in the Bible. The central...
